fuses.description: Main power window switch, left rear power window switch
Main power window switch, passenger power window switch, right rear power window switch
Driver/passenger seat manual switch, driver lumbar support switch
Rear defogger switch, driver/passenger side electric exterior mirror
Instrument panel (IND.), passenger/driver door light, reading light, cabin light, cargo light, courtesy light switch, rear left/right individual cabin light

Front air conditioning control module, instrument panel ionizer, rain sensor, electrochromic mirror, sunroof motor, rear air conditioning switch, ICM relay box (rear air conditioning relay, headlight washer relay), fan relay, GM02 (Ground)
Front plug and lighter, rear plug
Door lock/unlock relay, ICM relay box (interlock relay), BCM driver/passenger door lock actuator, rear left/right door lock actuator, trunk door lock actuator, GM01 (ground)
Instrument panel (IND.), PAB deactivation switch, digital clock
ESP switch, steering angle switch, ICM relay box (P/N relay), driver/passenger seat heater control module, multifunction switch (Remocon)
ICM relay box (rear fog light relay)
PDM, smart key control module, start/stop button switch, FOB holder, key solenoid

Emergency relay, emergency switch, BCM, instrument panel (IND.), multifunction switch (light), rear combination light (OUT) left/right, driver/passenger side electric exterior mirror, left/right headlight
Rear wiper motor relay, rear wiper motor
Alternator, rear parking aid buzzer, instrument panel (IND.), BCM, tire pressure control module, smart key control module, A/V and main navigation unit, PIO unit
Smart key control module, PDM, BCM
ICM relay box (rear air conditioning relay)
Tire pressure control module, front left/right initiator, rear left initiator
Audio, A/V and main navigation unit, PIO unit, BCM, PDM, smart key control module, digital clock, driver/passenger side electric exterior mirror switch
Fan relay, fan motor, air conditioning switch 10A
BCM, RF receiver, ignition key III, door warning switch, driver/passenger side electric exterior mirror switch, security indicator
Air conditioning control module, data link connector, digital clock
Audio, A/V and main navigation unit, PIO unit
BCM2 - Rheostat, BCM, PDM, instrument panel (MICOM)
(H/LP LO RH) Right headlight (low beam) relay
(H/LP LO LH) Left headlight (low beam) relay
(H/LP HI IND) Instrument panel (high beam indicator)
(TAIL RH) Rear combination light (input/output), right position light, glove box light, ICM relay box (DRL relays)
(SENSOR 3) G4KE: Injector 1~4, canister purge solenoid valve G6DC: PCM, oil control valve 1/2 (exhaust/intake), canister purge solenoid valve, variable intake manifold valve 1/2. D4HB - ECM
(TAIL LH) License plate light, left rear combination light (input/output), left position light
(FR WIPER) Rain sensor relay, front windshield wiper relay, front windshield wiper motor, multifunction switch (wiper)
(TCU) PCM (G4KE/G6DC), TCM (D4HB), 4WD ECM (D4HB ATT) Battery sensor

(ABS) Multipurpose check connector, ABS control module, 4WD, ECM, ESP control module, brake light switch (G6DC), intermittent interval sensor. Fuse link box (fuel filter heater relay) (D4HB), Fuel filter warning sensor (D4HB)
(COOLING) Condenser fan relay (G6DC), Glow relay unit (D4HB)
(B/UP LP) Reverse light relay, reverse light switch (G4KE/D4HB)
(H/LP) Left/right headlight (low beam) relay, front fog light relay, headlight (high beam) relay, automatic headlight leveling device sensor, left/right headlight leveling device actuator
(ECU) PCM (G4KE/G6DC), ECM/TCM (D4HB), Alternator (G6DC), Mass air flow sensor (D4HB), transmission range switch

(SENSOR 1) G4KE brake light switch, immobilizer module, air conditioning relay, fuel pump relay, condenser, fan relay (low/high beam), crankshaft position sensor, oil control valve 1/2, camshaft position sensor 1/2, upper oxygen sensor, variable intake manifold valve. G6DC PCM, air conditioning relay, fuel pump relay, injector 1~6. D4HB brake light switch, immobilizer module, air conditioning relay, fuel pump relay, condenser, fan relay (low/high beam), Lambda sensor, rail pressure regulator valve, fuse link box (PTC heater relay 1)
(SENSOR 2) G4KE PCM, lower oxygen sensor. G6DC PCM, oxygen sensor 1~4. D4HB fuel pressure regulator valve, oil level sensor, EGR cooling bypass solenoid, electric VGT actuator
(IG COIL) G4KE - Condenser, ignition coil 1~4/ G6DC Condenser 1/2, ignition coil 1~6. D4HB ECM
